Bias: bearish on higher tf, downtrend, switched on lower tf
Emotions: ambivalent, angry, anxious, confident, fearful, frustrated, greedy, happy, calm, excited, i was stable before entering but not while in the trade, stressed
How Did The Trade Play Out?: not as expected, blew account, rapidly opposed my idea, the outcome is clear as day now
Mistakes: kept moving stoploss, trade during news event, fear of loss, bleed, continued to retrace after entry, ignored recent bias in order to stick to my plan, not an a+ setup, stayed too long, stopped out on retractement
Notes For Coaches: there were 3 times i thought of exiting (at the start and 2 latter points the market came back), i didn't listen to that feeling and instead listened to the opposite, this one effected me emotionally severely and took me quite a while to digest, i had to take a trade to pass the eval anyway but wow i can't continue like this, i have much more i am journaling on but maybe that was the humbling experience i still needed yet
Profit Target Did You Respect It?: aiming to trail beyond local low, didnt even stand a chance, respected, thought of exiting early but stayed in, thought of exiting in profit twice but stayed
Stop Loss Did You Respect It?: auto-liquidated, essentailly cancelled, not respected, original stop would have hit, stop hit
What I Did Well: journaled and documented data, realized the trade was moving the opposite direction
